turns.user_message: I noticed I didn't feel excited about the weekend at all. It's just another couple of days.
This feeling has been hanging around for a while now. I can't seem to care about anything I used to look forward to.
I'm starting to think this emptiness is just who I am now. Nothing reaches me anymore, and I don't know if anything ever will.

generation_metadata.diversity_anchor: The speaker opens with something they noticed about themselves.
